categorization_rationale: Net-new service component with new public ingress and new external egress; no FedRAMP Certification class change and no federal customer data introduced, so not transformative and not a class change; not regular/routine maintenance, so not routine-recurring. Resolves to Adaptive per SCN-CSO-EVA. Sits at the upper edge of Adaptive due to the new non-FedRAMP-authorized external interconnection (Anthropic); the absence of federal customer data is what keeps it out of Transformative.
short_description: Adds the gated "Silk Reeling Mirror" app: a public, HTTP-Basic-Auth-gated API Gateway HTTP API -> Python 3.13 ZIP Lambda serving a browser SPA; the Lambda calls the Anthropic API to generate movement-feedback text.
reason_for_change: New self-service capability addition to the site.
customer_impact: New customer/operator-responsibility control: operator-set HTTP Basic Auth credential (POAM-021). SAML/IdP federation is the recommended upgrade. No change to existing customers' configuration responsibilities.
plan_and_timeline: Gated deploy (create_silk_reeling=true) -> OPA + Checkov + tfsec gate -> Syft/Grype SCA over the built artifact -> VDR report regenerated -> post-implementation secure-configuration verification (Adaptive requirement) -> KSI signal + OSCAL SSP re-emitted. Controls/KSIs to re-verify: RA-5/VDR-*, SA-9/CA-3, SC-7, AC-3/IA-2, AU-2/AU-3, SC-12/SC-28.
new_risks_summary: POAM-019..024 (all risk-accepted, Low residual) plus the new-ecosystem SCA blind-spot, remediated by adding Syft/Grype SCA of the built Lambda+SPA artifact to CI feeding the VDR aggregator (RA-5/VDR-CSO-DET).
status: Implemented — live in production (first prod deploy 2026-06-03 via PR #82); post-implementation verification COMPLETE 2026-06-08 at prod commit 354da59 (pass: KEV 0 / blocking 0; SSP data-flow + interconnection rendered; deployed Python/JS deps CVE-free; CM-8 inventory complete)
notify_by: No necessary parties (no sponsor/customers); the public GitHub push that publishes the certification data is the notification (SCN-CSO-NOM / SCN-ADP-NTF)

related_vulnerability: POAM-021 / POAM-022 / POAM-023 (single-factor shared credential; authorizer-less API; unthrottled credential endpoint)
categorization_rationale: Replaces the end-user authentication mechanism of an existing public-facing component (HTTP Basic Auth -> Cognito with mandatory TOTP MFA + API Gateway JWT authorizer). No class change, no federal customer data, no new external interconnection, so not Transformative; an authentication-model change is not routine-recurring maintenance. Resolves to Adaptive per SCN-CSO-EVA. Backfilled record: the change shipped 2026-06-22 via the gated PR flow; this row completes the register (SCN-CSO-HIS).
short_description: Silk Reeling auth replacement: Basic Auth retired; Cognito user pool (mandatory TOTP MFA, 14-char minimum, admin-only creation) with Hosted UI (code + PKCE); JWT authorizer on ANY /api/{proxy+}; $default stays open serving the SPA shell only; stage throttling 20 rps / burst 10; API access logging to a CMK-encrypted log group.
reason_for_change: Remediate POAM-021/022/023: retire the single-factor shared credential and gate the data API at the edge with rate limiting.
customer_impact: App users sign in with an invited individual account and mandatory TOTP MFA instead of a shared password. No agency customers exist.
plan_and_timeline: Gated deploy (OPA + Checkov gate) -> Cognito pool + authorizer + throttling applied via Terraform -> post-implementation verification of live authorizer/MFA/throttling/logging -> KSI signal + OSCAL SSP + POA&M re-emitted. Controls/KSIs re-verified: IA-2(x)/IA-8, AC-7, SC-5, AU-2/AU-3, KSI-IAM-*.
new_risks_summary: Shared-credential and unthrottled-endpoint risks retired with POAM-021/023 closure. Residual: TOTP is not phishing-resistant (WebAuthn/FIDO2 upgrade path documented, POAM-025 direction); Cognito availability becomes a sign-in dependency (AWS-managed).
status: Implemented - live in production since 2026-06-22 (Task 3; POAM-021/022/023 closed); post-implementation verification COMPLETE 2026-07-06 via read-only AWS CLI (JWT authorizer on data routes, MFA ON, 14-char policy, admin-only creation, 20/10 throttling, access logging live)
notify_by: No necessary parties (no sponsor/customers); the public GitHub push that publishes the certification data is the notification (SCN-CSO-NOM / SCN-ADP-NTF)
